headline: Snap-on to Present at 38th Annual Roth Conference
summary: KENOSHA, Wis., March 16, 2026--Snap-on announced that its CEO Nick Pinchuk is scheduled to present at the 38th Annual Roth Conference in California on Monday, March 23, 2026.
